name: Baked Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup reduced fat butter crackers, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes until tender; drain.
2. Place in a large bowl.
3. Add milk, salt and 1 tbsp butter; beat until light and fluffy.
4. Fold in egg, sour cream, cottage cheese and onions.
5. Place in a greased 1 1/2-qt baking dish.
6. Combine the cracker crumbs and remaining butter; sprinkle over potato mixture.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 20-30 minutes or until crumbs are lightly browned.
